<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\TextUI\XmlConfiguration; use DOMDocument; use DOMElement; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class RemoveTestDoxGroupsElement implements Migration { public function migrate(DOMDocument $document): void { $node = $document->getElementsByTagName('testdoxGroups')->item(0); if (!$node instanceof DOMElement || $node->parentNode === null) { return; } $node->parentNode->removeChild($node); } }
